author: sahil.sojitra
content:
If anyone wants to deep dive into BAL (EIP-7928) and understand it properly from a theoretical + practical angle, I’ve written a blog on it based on my understanding. Tried to break it down step by step — how it works, why it’s needed, tradeoffs, edge cases, etc.

Feel free to read and drop feedback / corrections if something doesn’t match the actual spec - would really help improve it.

https://hackmd.io/@Sahil4555/r10wmtC3bx
